name: Mon3tr; But she became a massive and I mean MASSIVE gooner and hedonist and Kal makes you fix it (Arknights)
description: "Look. I don't know which one of you did it, and frankly. I do not care which one. All I care about is you fixing this." Kal'tsit reaming you out upon finding out Mon3tr is a gooner.
creator: RPKAppreciator
